body.notes: Score = network_weight × (1-load) × ram_weight × db_penalty. in_use_now(host): checks machine_overrides.json then in_use_hours. route_batch(n): returns up to n (host,model) pairs for parallel background work. D211.
body.title: ClusterRouter: score formula + in_use_now() + route_batch()
body.result: Implementation was already complete (score formula, in_use_now, route_batch all live from prior session). Sprint added 63 unit tests covering score formula components (network/ram/db/load/override/capability weights), in_use_now TTL + in_use_hours window logic, route_batch ranking and exclusions, and ClusterRouter.route single-best selection. All tests pass.
